summary: A crystal‑clear matrix mix captures an outstanding Dead show – Sugaree and Terrapin>Playing soar, while the recording feels like a front‑row audience plus board blend.
review: The matrix created by Hunter Seamons delivers superb balance between soundboard and audience sources, giving the music depth, clarity and a natural‑room feel that many reviewers call “excellent” or “perfect.”  The performance itself is praised as fantastic – especially the second set, with Sugaree, Terrapin>Playing and Uncle John’s highlighted as show‑stoppers – though one reviewer notes some sloppiness in parts of the playing.  Overall the recording and show are received very positively.

ai_rating.rationale: Over a dozen detailed 5‑star reviews praise both the musical performance and the matrix’s technical quality; only a single low‑rating review mentions performance flaws, so the combined weighted score is very high.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Balance between SBD and audience sources described as spot‑on, crisp, three‑dimensional, natural vocal mix; no reported drop‑outs or distortion.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set singled out as a highlight with high energy and strong finish; overall show described as fantastic, with the mix enhancing the live experience.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Multiple reviewers note Jerry's enchanted singing, perfect guitar tone and natural‑sounding vocals in the matrix.
band_member_comments.Drums: Drums and cymbals called crystal clear; rhythm section praised for energy.
